name: globalsolaratlas_pvout
title: Photovoltaic power potential
description: Longterm yearly average of daily totals of potential photovoltaic electricity production (kWh/kWp).
details: Longterm yearly average of potential photovoltaic electricity production (PVOUT) in kWh/kWp, covering the period from 1994/1999/2007 (depending on the region) to 2015.

processing_options.description: average potential photovoltaic electricity production (kWh/kWp) per unit of analysis
maximum potential photovoltaic electricity production (kWh/kWp) per unit of analysis
minimum potential photovoltaic electricity production (kWh/kWp) per unit of analysis

variable_description: potential photovoltaic electricity production in kWh/kWp
citation: Solar resource data obtained from the Global Solar Atlas, owned by the World Bank Group and provided by Solargis. https://globalsolaratlas.info. Accessed online 2019-03-04.
